---
name: Request New Software / Report Compatibility
about: Ask to add a new Windows application to our list and share your compatibility experience.
title: 'Request: Add [Application Name]'
labels: 'app-request'
assignees: ''
---

### Application Information

* **Application Name:** [e.g., Winamp]
* **Official Website/Download URL:** [e.g., https://www.winamp.com]
* **Category:** [Choose one: Design, Office, Games, Social, Development, Audio, Utilities]

### Linux Compatibility Status

* **Did it work for you on Linux?**
  - [ ] Yes, it works perfectly (Native / Platinum / Gold)
  - [ ] Yes, it works with some tweaks (Silver / Bronze)
  - [ ] No, it does not work at all (Garbage)
  - [ ] I haven't tested it yet (Just requesting to add)

* **If it worked, how did you run it?**
  - [ ] Native Linux Version
  - [ ] Wine (WineHQ)
  - [ ] Bottles
  - [ ] Lutris
  - [ ] Steam (Proton)
  - [ ] Other: [Please specify]

* **Details / Tweaks / Installation Steps:**
  [If you needed special runners, DLL overrides, or offline installers, describe them here]

### Recommended Linux Alternatives

* **Are there any native Linux alternatives you recommend for this app?**
  [e.g., Audacious / QMMP for Winamp, ONLYOFFICE for MS Office]
